purpose: Small registry for current KosmoReferences pilot source packages, entry drafts and asset-package links.

policy.public_private_split: Source packages may point to private or link-only sources; public use requires review gates.
policy.media_policy: No images, plans, screenshots or copied source texts are public-ready unless file-level rights are cleared.
policy.library_status: The large owner book/ETH/HSLU library is still not visible in the checked local/OneDrive paths.

source_packages.title: Codex MarkItDown Smoke Source Package
source_packages.role: documents MarkItDown behavior for text-heavy PDFs and map-heavy PDFs

source_packages.title: ArchitectureKosmos Private Project Sources
source_packages.role: private owner/project doctrine for KosmoReferences, KosmoAsset, rights, ingestion and worker behavior

source_packages.title: Kapelle Sogn Benedetg Public Source Candidate
source_packages.role: link-only public-source candidate for the Swiss timber pilot

source_packages.title: Alterszentrum Kloster Ingenbohl Public Source Candidate
source_packages.role: link-only public-source candidate for the Roger Boltshauser / Ingenbohl pilot

source_packages.title: Villa Savoye Public Source Candidate
source_packages.role: link-only public-source candidate for the Villa Savoye goldstandard pilot

entry_drafts.title: Kapelle Sogn Benedetg
entry_drafts.role: preferred interim Swiss timber reference candidate

entry_drafts.title: Alterszentrum Kloster Ingenbohl
entry_drafts.role: Roger Boltshauser / contemporary Swiss transformation and material pilot

asset_libraries.title: KosmoReferences Pilot Seed Library
asset_libraries.role: local-review-only material/detail/structure seed candidates for Villa Savoye, Sogn Benedetg and Ingenbohl

reference_pilots.registry_role: preferred interim Swiss timber pilot until local book/lecture source package is found

next_actions: Find the real local book/ETH/HSLU library path.
Privately extract and index the ArchitectureKosmos project-source package for local worker context.
Add OCR/Vision/Layout extraction for scan, plan and map PDFs.
Resolve the Sogn draft-to-mock-entry bridge before relying on KosmoAsset context reports.
Promote no public media until rights gates pass.
Expose this registry in KosmoOrbit or Claude handoff views as a read-only data-lane map.
